clean_text:
KARNATAKA ROAD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION LIMITED
TENDER NOTICE NO: KRDCL/HB-07/2026-27
NOTICE INVITING TENDER (NIT)
Name of Work: Construction of Two-Lane Road with Paved Shoulders
               from Hubli to Dharwad (Package HB-07)
Estimated Cost: Rs. 38,50,00,000/- (Rupees Thirty Eight Crore Fifty Lakhs)
Period of Completion: 24 Months
Last Date of Submission: 30.06.2026, 3:00 PM
Date of Opening: 01.07.2026, 3:30 PM
Tenders are invited from eligible contractors registered with
Karnataka PWD (Class-I or above) for the above-mentioned work.
Tender documents can be downloaded from: www.krdcl.in

SECTION 1 - SCOPE OF WORK
1.1  The work involves construction of a two-lane road with 1.5m paved
     shoulders from Hubli (Km 0.000) to Dharwad (Km 22.400), totalling
     approximately 22.4 km in Dharwad District, Karnataka.
1.2  Major Components:
     (a) Earthwork in embankment
     (b) Granular sub-base and base course
     (c) Bituminous Macadam and Dense Bituminous Macadam layers
     (d) Wearing course - Semi Dense Bituminous Concrete (SDBC)
     (e) Construction of culverts, causeways and minor bridges
     (f) Road furniture, markings and signages
1.3  The contractor shall provide all materials, plant, equipment,
     labour and supervision required for satisfactory completion.
1.4  The work shall be executed as per MoRTH specifications for
     Road and Bridge Works (5th Revision).

SECTION 2 - QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS
2.1  General
     Only contractors who satisfy the following qualification criteria
     shall be eligible to submit bids. Non-compliance with any mandatory
     criterion shall result in rejection of bid.
2.2  Technical and Financial Eligibility
     2.2.1 Financial Capacity
     (a) Average Annual Turnover (AAT): The bidder must have achieved a
         minimum Average Annual Turnover of Rs. 30 Crore during the last
         three (3) consecutive financial years (FY 2022-23, 2023-24,
         2024-25), as certified by a Chartered Accountant.
     (b) Net Worth: The bidder's net worth, as per the latest audited
         balance sheet, shall not be less than Rs. 15 Crore.
     2.2.2 Technical Experience
     (b) The bidder shall have successfully completed at least two (2)
         road or highway construction works, each of value not less than
         Rs. 10 Crore, during the last five (5) years ending on the date
         of NIT publication.

SECTION 2 - QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS (continued)
     (c) At least one of the completed works shall be a single contract
         of value not less than Rs. 25 Crore.
     Supporting Documents Required:
     - Completion certificates from client authority
     - Final payment certificates
     - Performance certificates (satisfactory completion)
     2.2.3 Certifications
     (a) The bidder shall hold a valid ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management
         System certification issued by an accredited body.
     (b) Proof of registration with Karnataka PWD as Class-I contractor
         or equivalent in home state with reciprocal recognition.
2.3  Equipment Availability (Desirable)
     The bidder is expected to own or have confirmed access to the
     following key equipment:
     - Hot Mix Plant: minimum 60 TPH capacity
     - Sensor Paver Finisher: minimum 5m width
     - Tandem Vibratory Roller: 8-10 tonne
     - Pneumatic Tyred Roller: 12-15 tonne

SECTION 3 - BID EVALUATION CRITERIA
3.1  Evaluation Process
     Bids will be evaluated on a two-envelope system:
     Envelope 1: Technical Bid (qualification documents)
     Envelope 2: Financial Bid (Bill of Quantities)
3.2  Qualification Check
     Technical bids will be evaluated first. Only technically qualified
     bidders will have their financial bids opened.
3.3  Financial Bid
     The contract will be awarded to the Lowest Evaluated Bidder (L1)
     among technically qualified bidders.
3.4  Earnest Money Deposit (EMD)
     EMD of Rs. 38,50,000/- (1% of estimated cost) shall be submitted
     along with the technical bid by way of Demand Draft / Bank Guarantee
     in favour of Karnataka Road Development Corporation Limited.
SECTION 4 - SPECIAL CONDITIONS
4.1  Mobilisation Advance
     A mobilisation advance of up to 10% of contract value will be
     provided against a Bank Guarantee of equivalent amount.
4.2  Prior Experience with KRDCL
     Bidders who have previously executed works for KRDCL with satisfactory
     completion certificate (including Package HB-04 completed in 2024)
     are encouraged to participate.

SECTION 5 - SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS
5.1  Documents to be submitted in Technical Bid (Envelope 1):
     (a) Bid form and declaration
     (b) Audited Balance Sheets for FY 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25
     (c) CA certificate for Average Annual Turnover
     (d) Completion certificates for qualifying works
     (e) ISO 9001:2015 certificate (valid copy)
     (f) PWD registration certificate
     (g) GST registration and PAN card
     (h) EPF and ESI registration
     (i) List of equipment owned / to be hired
     (j) Key personnel deployment plan
5.2  All documents shall be attested by a Gazetted Officer.
5.3  Bids received after the deadline will not be considered under
     any circumstances.
For queries contact:
Executive Engineer (Procurement)
Karnataka Road Development Corporation Limited
No. 18, Cunningham Road, Bangalore - 560052
Phone: 080-22258400
Email: procurement@krdcl.in
END OF TENDER DOCUMENT
